title: Ananthagiri Temple
tagline: Ananthagiri Temple — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: Sri Anantha Padmanabha Swamy or Ananthagiri Temple is a Hindu temple located in Ananthagiri, Vikarabad district in Telangana, India.
overview.description: Sri Anantha Padmanabha Swamy or Ananthagiri Temple is a Hindu temple located in Ananthagiri, Vikarabad district in Telangana, India. It is temple of Lord Vishnu. The temple is about 75 km from Gachibowli, Hyderabad.

topPlaces.name: Vikarabad
topPlaces.description: Vikarabad, formerly known as Gangawaram, is a town and mandal in Vikarabad district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Vikarabad mandal of Vikarabad revenue division.

items.note: Vikarabad, formerly known as Gangawaram, is a town and mandal in Vikarabad district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Vikarabad mandal of Vikarabad revenue division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ananthagiri Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ananthagiri Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ananthagiri Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (61 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (68 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ananthagiri Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ananthagiri Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ananthagiri Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ananthagiri Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
